title: Amtech B3300 100 Piece assorted terminals
features: USEFUL ASSORTMENT: This set contains a useful assortment of 100 tin plated, copper crimp terminals and connectors with PVC insulation
APPLICATIONS: They are ideal for automotive, model making and small DC electrical appliance repairs and are compatible with amtech's B3310 and B3325 crimping tools
PLEASE NOTE: These terminals are NOT suitable for household 230V AC domestic wiring
PRECISION CONTROL: Easy to handle with good balance for accurate work.
PORTABLE DESIGN: Compact ideal for working in confined spaces.
description: Product Description Amtech have a fantastic range of essential tools for all your DIY requirements. Great value prices are coupled with a very compelling 3 year product guarantee. So keep your home, garage and garden looking great and well maintained for less! Don’t forget to also take advantage of Amtech’s free product advice service – see pack for more details. Please note that Amtech warranty and service terms are only applicable to genuine Amtech products. Safety Warning No Box Contains 100x Insulated crimp terminals and connectors See more
